title: (Bullish Signal) LE, price moved above its 50-day Moving Average on May 26, 2021
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This price move could indicate a change in the trend, and may be a buy signal for investors. A.I.dvisor found 35 similar cases, and 32 were successful. Based on this data, the odds of success are 90%. Current price $24.27 crossed the support line at $23.55 and is trading between $26.70 resistance and $23.55 support lines. Throughout the month of 04/26/21 - 05/26/21, the price experienced a +4% Uptrend. During the week of 05/19/21 - 05/26/21, the stock enjoyed a +6% Uptrend growth.

https://preview.redd.it/e5gv63tscp171.png?width=1520&format=png&auto=webp&s=79b81b255033565ea162355cdc6bc7ee62b4a2a1

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Momentum Indicator moved above the 0 level on May 24, 2021. You may want to consider a long position or call options on LE as a result. In 69 of 81 past instances where the momentum indicator moved above 0, the stock continued to climb. The odds of a continued upward trend are 85%.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) for LE just turned positive on May 17, 2021. Looking at past instances where LE's MACD turned positive, the stock continued to rise in 39 of 51 cases over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 76%.

Following a +2.23% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where LE advanced for three days, in 253 of 310 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 82%.

LE may jump back above the lower band and head toward the middle band. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options.
